_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in the use of social engineering techniques.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and evaluating prompt engineering strategies, including few-shot prompting, chain-of-thought prompting, and structured output generation.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-002 (AB, cosine: 0.409), RM-S-002 (RM, cosine: 0.408).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.9/10 (raw 0.590). Shared vocabulary: [engineering, skill]. DCWF-only terms [social, techniques, use] vs WIDAI-only terms [chain, designing, evaluating, few, generation, output] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.893 (P=0.932, R=0.857). P exceeds R by 0.075 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.8%). "Skill in the use of social engineering techniques." and "Skill in designing and evaluating prompt engineering strategies, including few-s" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.430 < STS 0.590 (gap -0.160). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [social, techniques, use] and [chain, designing, evaluating] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 18.2%. Shared tokens: [engineering, skill]. DCWF-only: [social, techniques, use]. WIDAI-only: [chain, designing, evaluating, few, generation, output].
